description: Computer-aided manufacturing for Oblikovati: defines a machining Job over a part (stock, tools, operations), generates 2.5D and 3D toolpaths (clearing, profiling, drilling and hole-making, surfacing, probing) with dress-ups, and posts them to machine G-code (LinuxCNC, GRBL, Fanuc, Marlin, Haas, Heidenhain).
